title: Annual Charity Gala for Literacy Program

all.en: The Brightpath Literacy Foundation cordially invites you to attend our 12th Annual Charity Gala Dinner, an evening dedicated to celebrating the transformative power of reading.
all.zh: 光徑識字基金會誠摯邀請您出席我們第十二屆年度慈善晚宴，這是一個專為慶祝閱讀變革力量而舉辦的夜晚。

all.en: As a registered nonprofit organization, Brightpath has spent over a decade equipping underserved children and adults with the literacy skills necessary to thrive in school, the workplace, and everyday life.
all.zh: 作為一個立案的非營利組織，光徑十多年來致力於為弱勢兒童與成人提供在學校、職場與日常生活中茁壯成長所需的識字技能。

all.en: Our mission is straightforward: to ensure that every member of our community, regardless of age or background, has access to high-quality reading instruction and learning materials free of charge.
all.zh: 我們的宗旨很簡單：確保社區中的每一位成員，無論年齡或背景，都能免費獲得高品質的閱讀指導與學習教材。

all.en: Thanks to the extraordinary generosity of last year's donors, we raised more than 480,000 dollars, which enabled us to expand our after-school tutoring program to seventeen additional schools.
all.zh: 由於去年捐贈者非凡的慷慨解囊，我們募得超過四十八萬美元，使我們得以將課後輔導計畫擴展至另外十七所學校。

all.en: Over 2,300 beneficiaries, including 1,800 elementary students and 500 adult learners, directly benefited from these contributions during the past fiscal year.
all.zh: 在過去的會計年度，超過二千三百位受益人，包括一千八百名小學生與五百名成人學員，直接受惠於這些捐款。

all.en: This year's gala will be held on Saturday, October 18, from 6:30 p.m. to 10:30 p.m., at the Grand Riverside Ballroom located at 285 Harbor Avenue, downtown Westbrook.
all.zh: 今年的晚宴將於十月十八日週六晚間六點三十分至十點三十分舉行，地點位於西布魯克市中心海港大道二八五號的河畔大宴會廳。

all.en: The evening will feature a three-course gourmet dinner prepared by award-winning chef Marcus Whitfield, followed by live entertainment from the renowned Harborview String Quartet.
all.zh: 當晚將提供由得獎主廚馬庫斯．惠特菲爾德烹製的三道式美食晚餐，隨後由著名的海景弦樂四重奏帶來現場演出。

all.en: Individual tickets are priced at 175 dollars per person, while reserved tables seating ten guests are available for 1,600 dollars, offering modest savings for groups.
all.zh: 個人票每位定價一百七十五美元，可容納十位賓客的預訂桌則為一千六百美元，提供團體些許優惠。

all.en: All ticket purchases and donations made to the foundation are fully tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law, and official receipts will be issued within thirty days of the event.
all.zh: 所有購票及對基金會的捐款，在法律允許範圍內皆可全額抵稅，正式收據將於活動結束後三十天內開立。

all.en: For organizations interested in deeper engagement, we offer three distinct sponsorship tiers designed to align with various philanthropy budgets and visibility goals.
all.zh: 對於有意更深入參與的組織，我們提供三種不同的贊助級別，旨在配合各種慈善預算與曝光目標。

all.en: Platinum Sponsors, contributing 25,000 dollars or more, will receive two premium tables, full-page color recognition in the program booklet, and prominent logo placement on all event signage.
all.zh: 白金級贊助商捐款二萬五千美元以上，將獲得兩張頂級桌位、活動手冊全頁彩色致謝，以及在所有活動標識上顯著的標誌呈現。

all.en: Gold Sponsors at the 10,000-dollar level will be allocated one reserved table, a half-page acknowledgment, and verbal recognition during the welcome address by our executive director.
all.zh: 金級贊助商捐款一萬美元，將獲分配一張預訂桌、半頁致謝版面，以及由執行長在歡迎致詞中口頭致意。

all.en: Silver Sponsors, whose contribution starts at 5,000 dollars, will be entitled to four complimentary tickets and a quarter-page mention in our printed materials and digital newsletter.
all.zh: 銀級贊助商捐款五千美元起，將享有四張免費入場券，以及在我們的印刷品與電子報中四分之一頁的提及。

all.en: A highlight of the evening will be our silent auction, featuring over sixty exclusive items donated by local businesses, artists, and longtime supporters of the foundation.
all.zh: 當晚的亮點將是我們的無聲拍賣會，展出超過六十件由當地企業、藝術家及基金會長期支持者所捐贈的獨家物品。

all.en: Auction items range from luxury weekend getaways and fine dining experiences to original artwork, signed first-edition novels, and a private cooking class for eight people.
all.zh: 拍賣物品從豪華週末度假套裝、高級餐飲體驗，到原創藝術作品、簽名首版小說，以及八人份的私人烹飪課程，應有盡有。

all.en: Bidding will open at 7:00 p.m. and close promptly at 9:45 p.m., with winners announced immediately afterward and items available for collection that same night.
all.zh: 競標將於晚間七點開始，並於九點四十五分準時結束，得標者將立即公布，物品可於當晚領取。

all.en: Guests who are unable to attend in person are warmly encouraged to participate remotely through our online giving platform, where every contribution, large or small, makes a meaningful difference.
all.zh: 無法親自出席的賓客，我們誠摯鼓勵您透過線上捐款平台遠端參與，每一筆捐款，無論大小，都能帶來有意義的改變。

all.en: To RSVP, please visit our official website at www.brightpathliteracy.org/gala2026 and complete the registration form no later than Friday, October 3.
all.zh: 如欲回覆出席意願，請於十月三日週五前造訪我們的官方網站 www.brightpathliteracy.org/gala2026 並填妥報名表單。

all.en: Dress code for the evening is formal attire, and complimentary valet parking will be provided at the main entrance of the ballroom for all confirmed attendees.
all.zh: 當晚著裝要求為正式服裝，所有確認出席者皆可於宴會廳正門享用免費代客泊車服務。

all.en: Should you have any questions regarding sponsorship packages, dietary accommodations, or general inquiries, please contact our events coordinator, Ms. Helena Choi, at 555-0142 or events@brightpathliteracy.org.
all.zh: 若您對贊助方案、特殊飲食需求或一般事項有任何疑問，請聯繫我們的活動協調員崔海蓮娜小姐，電話 555-0142 或電郵 events@brightpathliteracy.org。

all.en: Corporate sponsors wishing to discuss customized partnership opportunities are invited to schedule a private consultation with our development director by emailing partnerships@brightpathliteracy.org.
all.zh: 企業贊助商若希望討論客製化合作機會，歡迎透過電郵 partnerships@brightpathliteracy.org 預約與我們的發展總監進行私人諮詢。

all.en: Every dollar raised through this fundraiser directly supports tutoring services, the purchase of age-appropriate books, and ongoing professional training for our dedicated team of volunteer instructors.
all.zh: 透過本次募款活動所募得的每一塊錢，都將直接用於支援輔導服務、購置適齡書籍，以及我們敬業志工教師團隊的持續專業培訓。

all.en: On behalf of the board of trustees, the staff, and most importantly the learners whose lives you help transform, we extend our deepest gratitude for your continued support of our charity.
all.zh: 謹代表董事會、全體員工，以及最重要的、其人生因您而改變的學員們，我們對您持續支持本慈善事業致上最誠摯的謝意。

all.en: Together, we can turn the page on illiteracy and write a brighter chapter for the next generation of readers, learners, and leaders in our community.
all.zh: 讓我們攜手翻轉文盲的篇章，為社區中下一代的讀者、學習者與領袖，譜寫更光明的篇章。
